expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: The run does restate the case focus and contract, but concludes it cannot be demonstrated: result.md says "there are no support signal issue keys (support_signal_issue_keys: [])" and therefore "no supporting-issue set to which the policy can be applied" and summary production is "not applicable / not verifiable". execution_notes.md likewise: "support-only phase1 path ... cannot be demonstrated from provided evidence, making the result inconclusive." This does not satisfy the expectation that the behavior is explicitly covered/verified for supporting issues.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly scopes to phase1: "Primary phase/checkpoint: phase1 (phase contract)" and evaluates phase1 requirements (spawn requests, phase1 artifacts, phase1 --post validations). execution_notes.md also frames the benchmark focus as "in phase1" and discusses phase1 evidence limits. The output is aligned to phase1 even though the case is inconclusive.
